title: Warma: Reborn 沃玛：重生
description: A simple mod that adds about Bilibili Uploader Warma.
body:
**该模组已无限期停更（因为warma和模组作者都是鸽子:p）**

**模组作者在此表示最高的歉意**

**_Please check out the mod page with a certain Chinese and make sure you have access to Chinese Internet_**

# 简体中文

此模组增加了一些在Warma视频里出现的东西，

比如沃玛、店员、沃沃头等

此模组只是为了在生存中添加一些关于沃玛的东西，以让生存变得更好玩，虽然本模组并没有啥好玩的地方

本模组使用MCreator开发，可以随便放在什么整合包里，除非进行商业用途，否则无需征求作者的意见

此模组增加“重生（Reborn）”是因为在此之前作者已经开发了[一个关于Warma的模组](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1am4y1E7cB)，但已经存档。

由于git的一些特别深金的bug导致github仓库无法上传，因此以后的源代码将与模组一起上传。

# English(Translated from Bing)

This mod adds some things that appear in Warma videos,

For example, Warma, Dianyuan(the clerk) and other animations.

This mod is just to add something about Warma to survival to make survival more fun, although there is nothing interesting about this mod.

This mod was developed using MCreator and can be placed in any modpack you want, without consulting the author unless it is for commercial use.

The addition of "Reborn" to this mod is due to the fact that the author had already developed [a mod about Warma](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1am4y1E7cB) before that, but it had already been archived.

Because git has some bug so my github repository can't upload, so later source code will upload with mod's jar.
